item.title: Forensic Lab, Homicides, Construction Safety
item.ns0:title: Forensic Lab, Homicides, Construction Safety
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, the government steps in to underwrite the costs of critical DNA testing for the victims of the North Andros plane crash as the nation continues to mourn. We investigate a recent wave of violence following two separate fatal shootings in the capital and bring you details on a major safety crackdown at construction sites across New Providence. Our team also explores the growing frustration over power outages on the Family Islands and a troubling report concerning a murder suspect who allegedly missed dozens of bail check-ins. Stay tuned for these stories, the latest on the country’s improved credit rating, and your full sports and weather updates.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, the government steps in to underwrite the costs of critical DNA testing for the victims of the North Andros plane crash as the nation continues to mourn. We investigate a recent wave of violence following two separate fatal shootings in the capital and bring you details on a major safety crackdown at construction sites across New Providence. Our team also explores the growing frustration over power outages on the Family Islands and a troubling report concerning a murder suspect who allegedly missed dozens of bail check-ins. Stay tuned for these stories, the latest on the country’s improved credit rating, and your full sports and weather updates.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, the government steps in to underwrite the costs of critical DNA testing for the victims of the North Andros plane crash as the nation continues to mourn. We investigate a recent wave of violence following two separate fatal shootings in the capital and bring you details on a major safety crackdown at construction sites across New Providence. Our team also explores the growing frustration over power outages on the Family Islands and a troubling report concerning a murder suspect who allegedly missed dozens of bail check-ins. Stay tuned for these stories, the latest on the country’s improved credit rating, and your full sports and weather updates.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
